text: {"verdict":"block","summary":"The PR adds only a deliberately throwaway trivial theorem, so it is placeholder library content rather than a faithful formalization contribution.","findings":[{"file":"TauCeti/Basic.lean","line":"19","issue":"`TauCeti.two_pos : 0 < 2` is a trivial placeholder; the docstring says it is \"used only to exercise the review harness\", so the declaration has no mathematical content for the library.","fix":"Remove `two_pos`, or replace this PR with a real roadmap-backed theorem or definition whose statement is the intended mathematical content.","evidence":"Diff adds `/-- A throwaway lemma, used only to exercise the review harness. -/ theorem two_pos : 0 < 2 := by norm_num`."}]}

verdict_obj.summary: The PR adds only a deliberately throwaway trivial theorem, so it is placeholder library content rather than a faithful formalization contribution.

findings.issue: `TauCeti.two_pos : 0 < 2` is a trivial placeholder; the docstring says it is "used only to exercise the review harness", so the declaration has no mathematical content for the library.
findings.fix: Remove `two_pos`, or replace this PR with a real roadmap-backed theorem or definition whose statement is the intended mathematical content.
findings.evidence: Diff adds `/-- A throwaway lemma, used only to exercise the review harness. -/ theorem two_pos : 0 < 2 := by norm_num`.
